_note: Area 22 hourly sales backfill for forecast shaping. Import: npm run import-forecast-history -- dashboard/data/forecast-history/your-file.json

_format.actual: Hourly actual $ for trading window - index 0 = openHour (e.g. 10am). Length = closeHour - openHour.
_format.actualRaw: Optional Macromatix Labour Scheduler array (index 0 = 5AM). Use actualFormat: raw-mmx if sending raw only.
_format.openHour: Store open hour (24h). Default 10 if omitted.
_format.closeHour: Store close hour (24h). Default 22 if omitted.
_format.actualTotal: Optional day total; computed from actual[] if omitted.
